reviews.comment:
El seguro que brinda ACA es pesimo. Contrate un seguro contra todo riesgo hace casi 4 años, pero al momento de un siniestro dan miles de vueltas. El taller peugeot de Rincon me paso un presupuesto dudoso de mas de 95000 pesos (casi lo que sale mi auto usado)  por reparar tren delantero. La caja dice que solo cubre 16000 pesos! menos la franquicia que tengo que pagar, solo me cubriria 11000 pesos. Es una gran estafa al servicio que contraté. Obviamente no lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
The insurance provided by ACA is terrible. I took out comprehensive insurance almost four years ago, but when it comes to an accident, they give you the runaround. The Peugeot workshop in Rincon gave me a dubious estimate of over 95,000 pesos (almost the value of my used car) to repair the front suspension. The insurance company says it only covers 16,000 pesos! After deducting the excess I have to pay, it would only cover 11,000 pesos. It's a huge rip-off of the service I contracted. Obviously, I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdV9xbWZBEAE

reviews.comment:
La estación en general está bien, baños amplios y limpios. La atención de los surtidores y de Full es muy buena, lo que es paupérrimo es la cocina, me pedí una ciabata criolla ya que la foto se veía espléndida y me encontré con dos rodajas de peceto sin sabor y las verduras ( los  morrones y cebollas) brillaban por su ausencia. Lo bueno es que siendo uno socio del A.C.A tiene descuento 5% en combustible y 10% en Full

(Translated by Google)
The station is generally fine, with spacious and clean restrooms. The service at the pumps and at the Full station is very good, but the food is terrible. I ordered a ciabatta criolla because the picture looked amazing, but I found two tasteless slices of beef and practically no vegetables (bell peppers and onions). The good thing is that as an ACA member, you get a 5% discount on fuel and a 10% discount at the Full station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMjlMcUlREAE

reviews.comment:
El taller mecanico es pesimo. Fue mi hermano por una leve perdida de aceite. Le dijeron que su arreglo costaba 6500 y y le sugirieron que aprovechara la mano de obra y  lo que se iba a desarmar para cambiar el kit correa de distribucion, liquido refrigerante y bomba de agua ( algo que se cambia segun dijeron cada 60000km o cada 4 años). Precio final de todo $10000. El auto tiene 24000km y es del 2008. Se acepto el arreglo. Esto fue un jueves. El sabado lo retiro. Lo uso solo un dia, y hoy jueves tuvo que volver porque se le encendia la luz de engine en el tablero y ahora le quieren cobrar 6500 porque sin ni siquiera un dia de uso se le rompio la bobina de encendido, cables de bujía, 4 bujías, líquido limpia inyectores. No entiendo de autos, pero el auto eataba bien salvo por lo del aceite y ahora casi sin haberlo usado ya tiene nuevos problemas. Desconfio!. Da para pensar mal.

(Translated by Google)
The mechanic shop is terrible. My brother took it there for a minor oil leak. They told him the repair would cost 6500 pesos and suggested he take advantage of the labor and the fact that they were going to disassemble the car to replace the timing belt kit, coolant, and water pump (something they said should be changed every 60,000 km or every 4 years). The final price for everything was 10000 pesos. The car has 24,000 km and is a 2008 model. He agreed to the repair. This was on a Thursday. He picked it up on Saturday. He only used it for one day, and today, Thursday, he had to go back because the check engine light came on. Now they want to charge him 6500 pesos because, without even a day of use, the ignition coil, spark plug wires, four spark plugs, and fuel injector cleaner broke. I don't know much about cars, but the car was fine except for the oil leak, and now, almost without having used it, it already has new problems. I'm suspicious! It makes you think the worst.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRbExlSW9BRRAB
